request.target_description: Binary outcome: claim resulted in a non-zero subrogation recovery within 18 months of FNOL.
request.population_filter: All auto BI/PD claims with FNOL between 2020-01-01 and 2024-12-31, excluding closed-without-payment and duplicates.
data_quality_concerns: subrogation_outcome may be null for in-progress claims older than 18 months
adjuster_tenure_years calculated from HR snapshot; joiners pre-2018 may be truncated

primary_queries.name: subrogation_training_set
primary_queries.sql:
SELECT
  c.claim_id,
  c.claim_type,
  c.fnol_ts,
  c.damage_amount_usd,
  DATEDIFF('day', c.incident_ts, c.fnol_ts) AS time_from_incident_to_filing_days,
  a.tenure_years AS adjuster_tenure_years,
  s.information_completeness_score,
  s.fault_evidence_level,
  CASE WHEN r.recovery_amount_usd > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS successful_subrogation
FROM claims_dw.public.claims c
JOIN claims_dw.public.adjusters a
  ON c.assigned_adjuster_id = a.adjuster_id
JOIN claims_dw.public.intake_scores s
  ON c.claim_id = s.claim_id
LEFT JOIN claims_dw.public.subrogation_recovery r
  ON c.claim_id = r.claim_id
 AND r.recovery_ts <= c.fnol_ts + INTERVAL '18 months'
WHERE c.fnol_ts BETWEEN '2020-01-01' AND '2024-12-31'
  AND c.claim_status <> 'duplicate'
  AND c.close_reason <> 'closed_without_payment'
primary_queries.purpose: Training set for the subrogation-success binary classifier. Joins the canonical claims table with adjuster tenure and intake-time completeness scores, and labels each row with the eventual recovery outcome observed within 18 months of FNOL.

quality_checks.check_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims_dw.public.claims WHERE fnol_ts BETWEEN '2020-01-01' AND '2024-12-31'
quality_checks.expectation: At least 500k rows based on annual claim volume.

quality_checks.check_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claims_dw.public.claims c LEFT JOIN claims_dw.public.subrogation_recovery r ON c.claim_id = r.claim_id WHERE c.fnol_ts BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2024-12-31' AND r.claim_id IS NULL
quality_checks.expectation: Most 2023-2024 claims should have a subrogation decision by now; null rate below 15%.

datasheet.motivation: Support a supervised classifier that scores subrogation recoverability at FNOL so adjusters can prioritize high-recovery claims.
datasheet.composition: One row per auto BI/PD claim with FNOL between 2020-01-01 and 2024-12-31, 6 features plus a binary outcome label.
datasheet.collection_process: Extracted from claims_dw by joining claims, adjusters, intake_scores, and subrogation_recovery tables.
datasheet.preprocessing: Closed-without-payment and duplicate claims are excluded. Recovery observation window capped at 18 months post-FNOL.
datasheet.uses: Supervised training and evaluation of the subrogation recoverability classifier. Not suitable for causal analysis.
known_biases: Adjuster tenure pre-2018 may be truncated due to HR snapshot horizon.
In-progress claims within the last 18 months may be right-censored.
datasheet.maintenance: Owned by Claims Analytics; refresh monthly from claims_dw.

summary: Built a single training set spanning 5 years of auto BI/PD claims with a binary subrogation-success label observed within 18 months of FNOL. 1.28M rows, ~10% label null rate concentrated in the most recent 18 months.
confirmed_expectations: Row count in the millions over the 5-year window.
Subrogation outcome observable for the majority of 2023-2024 claims.
unconfirmed_expectations: Information_completeness_score is populated for all new-system claims (need to verify backfill completeness for 2020-2021).
data_quality_concerns: Label leakage risk: information_completeness_score is computed post-intake and may reflect adjuster follow-up. Consider freezing at t+24h.
